steps.title: Show award order
steps.content: The goal is chronological: show which person won the A.M. Turing Award first and which won later. The notes give Sanjay Rao in 1994 and Daniel Flores in 1995.

steps.title: Reject nonsequence choices
steps.content: Choice A says both won but does not order them. Choice C gives only Flores's 1995 award. Choice D gives only Rao's 1994 award. The remaining choice names Rao first and marks Flores's award as later, making the sequence explicit. The answer is B.
